title: Totem Pozor
body:
_ENGLISH_   **A totem that will remind you of your true essence each time you use it.**

________________________________

_RUSSIAN_   **Тотем, который каждый раз будет напоминать тебе твою истинную сущность при каждом его использовании.**








</details>




![In the image, the Totem undying, which model has been replaced to Neco Arc, is holding by a player standing on mycelium blocks next to a torch.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a163acab3aa5e53bd0958b671d6d6737d2171ce.jpeg)
